articles.author: Luke Ramseth, Summer Ballentine
articles.title: UAW strike hits GM truck supplier American Axle - The Detroit News
articles.description: Almost 1,000 union members at the Three Rivers plant stopped work as they seek improved wages and benefits in a new contract.
articles.content: Nearly 1,000 United Auto Workers-represented employees of American Axle/Dauch Corp. went on strike Monday at the supplier's Three Rivers factory after the union and company failed to reach a new cont… [+4638 chars]
